question: What are the top 5 products by total revenue?
sql: SELECT p.name, p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: Show total sales by each salesman
sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders o JOIN salesmen s ON o.salesman_id = s.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: Which routes have the most outlets?
sql: SELECT r.name AS route_name, COUNT(ol.id) AS outlet_count FROM routes r JOIN outlets ol ON ol.route_id = r.id WHERE ol.is_active = 'true' GROUP BY r.id, r.name ORDER BY outlet_count DESC

question: What is the visit effectiveness rate per salesman?
sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(v.id) AS total_visits, SUM(CASE WHEN v.has_order = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS productive_visits, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN v.has_order = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(v.id), 2) AS effectiveness_pct FROM visits v JOIN salesmen s ON v.salesman_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY effectiveness_pct DESC

question: How many orders were placed this month?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE order_date >= date('now', 'start of month') AND status != 'cancelled'

question: List all active salesmen and their assigned routes
sql: SELECT s.name AS salesman, r.name AS route FROM salesmen s JOIN salesman_routes sr ON sr.salesman_id = s.id JOIN routes r ON sr.route_id = r.id WHERE s.is_active = 'true' AND sr.is_active = 'true' ORDER BY s.name

question: Total sales by product category
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_sales DESC

question: Show the number of orders per outlet
sql: SELECT ol.name AS outlet_name, ol.type, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM outlets ol LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.outlet_id = ol.id GROUP BY ol.id, ol.name, ol.type ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: Which salesmen have not made any visits this week?
sql: SELECT s.name FROM salesmen s WHERE s.is_active = 'true' AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT v.salesman_id FROM visits v WHERE v.visit_date >= date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days'))

question: What is the average order value?
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_amount), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'
